_comment: Corrections + additions for shelf books that Goodreads gets wrong or omits. Matched to shelf entries by title (case-insensitive). Any field you set here wins over the imported value, and these survive `npm run import`. To add a book Goodreads doesn't have at all, include title + author (+ rating, dateRead, cover, url). Reviews are NOT controlled here — edit those Markdown files directly.

books.title: A Tale for the Time Being
